ast.name: error
ast.target: \"todoist-indicator\" 插件初始化时发生意外错误。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where project files live, e.g. "Projects/".
ast.target: 项目文件所在的文件夹，例如 \"Projects/\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The tag that indicates Todoist link.
ast.target: 指示 Todoist 链接的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this setting enabled, badges will only appear on files (and their containing folder) with the project tag.
ast.target: 启用此设置后，徽章将仅出现在带有项目标签的文件（及其所在文件夹）上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The tag that indicates a file is a project file (handy in case you store project related files in a project folder).
ast.target: 指示文件是项目文件的标签（当您将项目相关文件存储在项目文件夹中时很方便）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please reload Obsidian after changing these settings for them to take effect.
ast.target: 更改这些设置后，请重新加载 Obsidian 以使其生效。
